verses.text: Pasian, i belh leh i thahatna hi a, haksat hunin a hong huh pahpahpa ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin, leitung kikhinin, mualte tuipi sung a kiden'na zongin, a tuite ging zuazua-in phuan zuazua a, hih gin'na hangin mual liante a ling zongin, i lau kei ding hi
Sangpenpa' ten'na khua siangtho, Pasian' khuapi, a lungdamsak gun khat a om hi
Ama laizangah Pasian om a, amah a kiling kei ding hi. Pasian in phalvak tungin amah huh ding hi
Minamte lungkham uh a, kumpi gamte kiling hi. Ama aw gingkhiasak a, leitung kicimgawp hi
Vanglian Topa eite tawh hong omkhawm a, Jakob Pasian eima belh ahi hi
Hong pai un la, Topa' sepna hong mu un. Leitung khempeuh gamkhing a suahsak khitna hong en un
Amah in leimong dongah gal beisak hi. Amah in thalpi kuaitanin teipi susia a, leengte mei tawh a haltum hi
“Om hithiat un la, Pasian ka hihna thei un. Minamte lakah keimah hong kisangsak a, leitung khempeuhah ka min hong kithangsak hi,” a ci hi
Vanglian Topa, eite tawh hong omkhawm a, Jakob' Pasian, eima belh ahi hi.
